INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid or expired session. Please log in again.
NOT_IN_GAME: You are not in this game.
WRONG_PHASE: That action is not available right now.
NO_TRADE_OFFER: There is no active trade offer.
PLAYER_DID_NOT_ACCEPT: That player has not accepted the trade.
NO_CARD: You don't have that card or already played one this turn.
SAME_HEX: The Bandit must move to a different tile.
NO_BUILDING_ADJACENT: That player has no building adjacent to that tile.
INTERNAL_ERROR: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
TRADE_IN_PROGRESS: Cancel your current trade offer first.
NOT_A_PLAYER: You are not a member of this game.
